Question: Which evidence describes the image?
The evidence about Bayern Munich players celebrating.

passages.text:
<image>
This evidence shows two Bayern Munich players celebrating on a soccer field.

<image>

This evidence discusses unrelated media files.

messages.content:
<image> Answer the question using the evidence.

<<<EVIDENCE>>>

Question: Why is the person on the ground?
He is sliding on his knees to celebrate.

passages.text: This evidence only says that a football player is visible.

<image>
This evidence says Thomas Muller is sliding on his knees after scoring.
This evidence says the player is celebrating on the field by sliding on his knees.
